preflight_items.required_evidence: Remote Apple Silicon host has mlx_lm.server or an equivalent MLX serving runtime available without installing from system prompts.
preflight_items.pass_condition: mlx_lm.server or equivalent command exists and returns help/version without Xcode CLT prompt

preflight_items.required_evidence: Python/venv/conda path for MLX is isolated and does not trigger Xcode command line tools install prompts.
preflight_items.pass_condition: isolated Python is available, mlx-lm package is discoverable, and no system install prompt appears

preflight_items.required_evidence: A non-GGUF experiment port is free and not one of 8686-8690.
preflight_items.pass_condition: chosen experiment port is not listening and does not collide with GGUF pool, backend, or Web Lab

preflight_items.required_evidence: GGUF daemon/report baseline is fresh before any MLX live experiment.
candidate_commands: read daemon status JSON for rounds, ledger_lag, stale, gate_failures
preflight_items.pass_condition: stale=false, ledger_lag=0, gate_failures=0, latest report round aligns with ledger/status

preflight_items.required_evidence: 32GB unified memory has enough free/headroom capacity to test one MLX slot without pushing GGUF pool into swap pressure.
preflight_items.pass_condition: memory pressure is normal, swap pressure is acceptable, and GGUF llama-server processes remain Metal accelerated

preflight_items.required_evidence: MLX experiment will not mutate GGUF worker manifest, ports 8686-8690, model cache, daemon config, or Web Lab routing.
preflight_items.pass_condition: all planned paths and ports are separate from GGUF pool and marked experimental
